skills.name: Context Hygiene
skills.description: Audit and prune stale planning artifacts, session handovers, and debug traces. Fails-closed on active specs/handovers.

modes.audit: Scan and report candidates without deleting
modes.prune: Archive completed artifacts, delete regenerable debug files

skills.name: MemPalace Management
skills.description: Wake-up, checkpoint, and handover memory loop using MemPalace with local handover/state authority.

modes.wake-up: Read MemPalace context first, then confirm local state index + latest handover
modes.checkpoint: Update handover draft and mine memory artifacts after each micro-task
modes.handover: Finalize handover JSON, update state index, and refresh MemPalace index

skills.name: Resource & Docker Management
skills.description: Guides for analyzing resource consumption (Chromium multi-process, memory constraints) and deploying changes safely to the running Docker environment.

modes.audit: Diagnose multi-process tree structure, active Chromium/Playwright usage, and V8 heap constraints vs. physical RAM limits.
modes.deploy: Build and restart the docker-compose service safely, preserving named volumes and environment overrides.

notes: context-hygiene skill added 2026-04-10; mempalace-management added 2026-04-19; resource-docker-management added 2026-05-25
